'''padhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:loanland|loanland]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-dh-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:loanland|loanland]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| padhaka
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pædhækæth|pædhækæth]] || [[word:pædhækæj|pædhækæj]] || [[word:pædhækæsh|pædhækæsh]] || [[word:pædhækæ|pædhækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:padhadhakath|padhadhakath]] || [[word:padhadhakaj|padhadhakaj]] || [[word:padhadhakash|padhadhakash]] || [[word:padhadhaka|padhadhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:padhakath|padhakath]] || [[word:padhakaj|padhakaj]] || [[word:padhakash|padhakash]] || [[word:padhaka|padhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:padhafkath|padhafkath]] || [[word:padhafkaj|padhafkaj]] || [[word:padhafkash|padhafkash]] || [[word:padhafkaf|padhafkaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:padhakatha|padhakatha]] || [[word:padhakaja|padhakaja]] || [[word:padhakasha|padhakasha]] || [[word:padhakaka|padhakaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:padhakath|padhakath]] || [[word:padhakaj|padhakaj]] || [[word:padhakash|padhakash]] || [[word:padhaka|padhaka]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:padhakathal|padhakathal]] || [[word:padhakajal|padhakajal]] || [[word:padhakashal|padhakashal]] || [[word:padhakakal|padhakakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:padhakathatha|padhakathatha]] || [[word:padhakajaja|padhakajaja]] || [[word:padhakashasha|padhakashasha]] || [[word:padhakaka|padhakaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:padhakathan|padhakathan]] || [[word:padhakajan|padhakajan]] || [[word:padhakashan|padhakashan]] || [[word:padhakakan|padhakakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:padhakathaoro|padhakathaoro]] || [[word:padhakajaoro|padhakajaoro]] || [[word:padhakashaoro|padhakashaoro]] || [[word:padhakakaoro|padhakakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
